164 of 314
The most commonly used point for pain induced by gallbladder stone is MuZhi. Other points are also effective,
such as QiLi, JiuLi, XiaBai and DanNangXue. DaChaiHuTang plus JinQianCao (Herba LySimachiae), JiNeiJin
(Endothelium Corneum Gigeriae Galli) and YuJin (Radix Curcumae) are also good.
